Your Lactation Coach

Empower - Nourish - Thrive

Welcome, I'm so glad you're here

Breastfeeding is natural, but it is not always easy.

Did you know that in Australia nine in ten infants (90.6%) are breastfed at birth. This means that most women want to breastfeed but six weeks later the percentage has sharply dropped. At 6 months two in five (37.5%) were exclusively breastfed. It is evident that mothers need support.

Please know that this is a safe space where you will find a gentle and personalised approach to support you with breastfeeding your little one. Our support is shaped around your unique feeding goals and parenting values. We know all too well that no two journeys are the same, and we will honour yours with care, respect, and understanding.

In every consultation, our focus is on empowering you to reach your goal.

If you are pregnant we would love to help you get off to a good start and reap the benefits.

We are here to share evidence-based knowledge, practical adjustments that can bring real comfort and progress.

Sometimes the smallest changes can have the biggest impact.

You are not meant to struggle or cope alone. Let us come alongside you, don’t wait.

Where to go next

If you are preparing before birth, start with antenatal support. If your baby is here and you need feeding help now, head to postnatal support.

Explore Antenatal Explore Postnatal
